person.mental_state: scared, in pain, calling for help

event.summary: An elderly person has slipped and fallen in the toilet. She is conscious, distressed, unable to get up, and repeatedly calls for help.
event.mechanism: slipped on wet bathroom floor while trying to turn

script.style_note: Short, breathy, distressed phrases. Suitable for TTS emergency-fall simulation.
script.text_hokkien:
救命啊！有人咧無？
我佇便所跋倒去矣，起袂來啊！
我的腰脊真痛，正爿髖骨嘛真痛，右跤膝頭無法度出力。
我頭有小可暈，真驚，真艱苦。
拜託你，緊來救我！幫我叫人，幫我叫救護車！
啊……真痛……我起袂來……救命啊……
script.english_gloss: Help! Is anyone there? I fell in the toilet and I can't get up. My lower back hurts badly, my right hip hurts, and my right knee cannot bear weight. I feel a little dizzy. I am scared and suffering. Please come help me. Call someone. Call an ambulance.
